name: Boogers
description: The time has come to put everything in its place and please your friend with attention. Boogers is a new hit for practical use: you open the application, turn on the search for a potential place of snot attraction and watch the screen. Just a couple of moments and you will leave your mark where it is needed. Dont waste the moment.
instructions: The Boogers app will help you find a place to stick a booger 1 Find the booger 2 Click start 3 We walk and look for the place where the booger detector points 4 Once a place is found we make a booger Good luck in your search
